item.title: Dog trained to illegally dump rubbish, Italian authorities say
item.description: "Ingenuity can never become an alibi for incivility", the City of Catania warns.

item.title: Asos co-founder dies after Thailand apartment block fall
item.description: Quentin Griffiths co-founded Asos in 2000 and remained a significant shareholder after leaving the firm five years later.

item.title: Rare prison sentences handed to Cameroon soldiers after killing of 21 civilians
item.description: In a rare occurence, three soldiers were handed jail terms for killings in the troubled Anglophone region.

item.title: Venezuelan opposition politician released after amnesty law passed
item.description: Juan Pablo Guanipa announces that he has been freed after "almost nine months" of imprisonment.

item.title: Tunisian MP jailed for eight months over posts mocking president
item.description: The MP was arrested this month after mocking the president's handling of the recent floods in the country.
